top_results.title: 中越边陲秘境之旅🍀崇左3天2夜轻松亲子游
top_results.author: 是鸭子啊

detail.day1: Arrive Mingshi Pastoral, afternoon e-bike ride through rice paddies and peak forests, Fish Scale Dam, cafe, evening cultural show
detail.day2: Mingshi to Detian Waterfall (30 min drive), Guangdong Jiangmen ID discount 35 CNY, bamboo raft 48 CNY, Paddy Field Coffee
detail.day3: Mingshi - Nali Hotel photo spot (free entry), Dao Na Li cafe (28 CNY incl. drink)

tips.transport: Use ride-sharing (Shunfengche) to Detian, rent e-bike at Mingshi (can't get taxi there)
tips.bug_protection: Wear long sleeves, bring sunscreen and mosquito repellent
tips.tickets: Book Detian 2 hours ahead online for discount, kids under 1.2m free
tips.warning: AVOID Dong Na Yu Wan (flood damage not repaired)

detail.accommodation: 暮云民宿 (Muiyun Homestay) at Mingshi

top_results.title: 五一遛娃｜广西崇左这个小众秘境
top_results.author: 遛娃版饭饭

searches.query: 德天瀑布 带娃 亲子

detail.key_advice: With kids/elderly: DO NOT follow the crowd route. Use the barrier-free (wheelchair-accessible) pathway instead.
detail.bamboo_raft_route: Board at Dock 1, exit at Dock 3, walk to boundary marker. After disembarking, walk TOWARD Paddy Field Coffee direction (short gentle steps), NOT the opposite direction with the crowd.
detail.critical_warning: If you follow the crowd in wrong direction, you'll encounter endless stairs that are exhausting.
detail.stroller_info: Barrier-free pathway: stroller OK. Bamboo raft route: has stairs, not stroller-friendly.
detail.accessibility: Elderly with no climbing = barrier-free pathway works fine. The pathway entrance is right at the scenic area entrance.
detail.shuttle_info: From viewing platform to exit: ~30 min walk. Option to take shuttle e-cart at Vietnamese Street area (~10 min ride but requires queuing).

top_results.title: 德天瀑布放水玄学🤷‍♀️带娃实测攻略
top_results.author: 周末哪里遛

detail.water_release_reality: The famous 12-14pm water release schedule is UNRELIABLE. China side releases 12-14pm, but water must first pass Vietnam's dam. Vietnam releases whenever they want.
detail.actual_experience: Arrived 2pm, waited until 4pm for big water flow.
detail.comment_insight: A comment explains: 'The release is from Vietnam's upstream hydropower station. When they open their floodgate to generate electricity, the reservoir water flows down. Nobody knows when Vietnam will open the gate.'
detail.bamboo_raft: 48 CNY/person, ONE-WAY only. 10 min ride, only ~10 seconds of waterfall spray. Kids under 1.2m free.
detail.recommended_route_with_baby: Shuttle bus (sit LEFT side for better views) → raft ticket booth → waterfall up close → stairs up to viewing platforms → exit via Paddy Field Coffee direction
detail.stroller_reverse_route: For strollers: walk the route in REVERSE. Start from the barrier-free pathway at the top (look for it at the beginning where stairs go down), walk the flat scenic road, then descend via stairs at the end. All downhill, no backtracking.
detail.weather_tip: Very warm, big temperature difference day/night. T-shirt + thin sweater + windbreaker jacket
detail.child_walking: Sleepy 2-year-old walked the entire route mostly by herself

top_results.title: 德天跨国瀑布省体力玩法
top_results.author: 九九Joe和Jeff

detail.stroller_route: From shuttle drop-off, take the RIGHT SIDE ramp/slope to push stroller all the way up. Scenic viewpoints along the way.
detail.paddy_coffee_access: When you see Paddy Field Coffee sign, stairs begin. Go down stairs to reach coffee and bamboo raft area.
detail.return: After experiencing everything, retrace your path back (same way).
detail.stroller_pushability: Confirmed: very easy to push stroller on the barrier-free viewing path

top_results.title: 德天跨国大瀑布闭眼都会走的轻松路线
top_results.author: 鹏程妈在鹏城

top_results.title: 是的！我带娃去了广西·德天大瀑布（淡季版）
top_results.author: Joey_Wuu

top_results.title: 崇左德天大瀑布，四月枯水期也很美
top_results.author: 嘎嘣脆

detail.dry_season_assessment: Came specifically for the waterfall. Heard dry season has low water. Still beautiful despite being dry season.
detail.water_release_schedule: Vietnam releases water 12:00-14:00. Arrived at gate 11:10am, shuttle 15 min to scenic area.
detail.release_timing: 12:00 release begins. By 12:30 you can see decent water volume.
detail.weather_warning: EXTREMELY HOT in April. Must do thorough sun protection.
detail.paddy_coffee: 28 CNY/cup, coffee is excellent, lots of seating, good for resting
detail.total_duration: 2 hours to see entire scenic area
detail.critical_tip: In dry season, TIMING IS EVERYTHING. Miss the water release window and you only see a trickle.

comment_qa.april_greenery: Question about whether rice paddies are green in early April - unanswered
comment_qa.april_heat: Question about April heat - unanswered but author noted it was blazing hot

top_results.title: 广西崇左德天跨国瀑布 4月不建议去！！！
top_results.author: 我生来偏执
top_results.detail_status: inaccessible (but title is the strongest April warning found)

top_results.title: 3-4月去崇左，可以邂逅中越边境的治愈春天
top_results.author: 诺子

detail.season_assessment: March-April: comfortable temperature, clean beautiful scenery, low crowds, good value lodging (off-season)
detail.clothing: Thin jacket + T-shirt. White/light colors photograph well with landscapes.
detail.must_bring: Non-slip sports shoes, sun protection trio (hat, sunglasses, sunscreen), umbrella/raincoat (spring = rainy), mosquito repellent
detail.accommodation_tip: March-April is LOW SEASON = great value. Mingshi homestays with mountain views, Shuolong town hotels for border vibe, or Yeshuji mushroom houses (can feed turtles, bamboo raft afternoon tea)
detail.dong_na_yu_wan: March mid to April early: five-color rapeseed flowers and snapdragon flowers in full bloom. Boat ride on Anping Fairy River.
detail.white_headed_langur: Only ~1000 left worldwide, can see them up close in Chongzuo nature reserve
detail.itinerary_4d3n: Day1: Nanning arrival. Day2: Detian Waterfall + Mingshi Pastoral. Day3: Gulong Grand Canyon + Goose Spring. Day4: Funa Secret Land + return
detail.itinerary_5d4n: Day1: Nanning. Day2: Funa + Mingshi cycling. Day3: Detian + Blue Hole Coffee. Day4: Gulong or Tongling Canyon. Day5: Dong Na Yu Wan or White Langur reserve + return

searches.query: 明仕田园 攻略 带娃

top_results.title: 崇左明仕田园游玩攻略
top_results.author: mayday0329

detail.transport: Chongzuo South Station → Mingshi: 40 CNY. Use mini-program '中旅趣边关上' to book. Very few bus times - plan carefully!
detail.accommodation: 欢朋雅宿 (Huanpeng Yasu) near Mingshi visitor center, walking distance. Clean rooms, good soundproofing, good breakfast.
detail.e_bike_rental: 20 CNY/hour at homestay door. Evening deal: 40 CNY until nighttime. Owner provides cycling route map. (Note: much more expensive than Yangshuo at 20/day)
detail.cycling_route: Ten-Mile Gallery (幸福桥 sunrise/sunset) → Lion's Kiss (天狮之吻) + Golden Mountain → Naguan Bridge → Fish Scale Dam (pass through rice paddies - very photogenic) → Dao Na Li Coffee (water + boats + paddies)
detail.food: Hotel has no dinner. Found great rice noodles at a random roadside shop during cycling. Smooth noodles, tender meat, fresh soup. Hotel breakfast noodles also good. Avoid the potato shreds.
warnings: At Chongzuo South Station exit, many touts will approach - stick with official transport from Tourist Center
Fish Scale Dam area charges parking fees for e-bikes/cars - park behind nearby houses to avoid
Some scenic areas require extra fees (bamboo rafts, restricted hotel zones), but cycling outside is equally beautiful
Roadside sugarcane juice is cheap and delicious - add ice + passion fruit

top_results.title: 从德天瀑布到明仕田园，崇左亲子怎么玩
top_results.author: 小芸芸

detail.self_drive_hack: DO NOT navigate to the Visitor Center (they force you to buy 35 CNY shuttle). Navigate to '德天御景民宿' instead. When stopped at gate, show a (refundable) hotel booking. Guards just take a photo and let you through. Then park right at the scenic area entrance and cancel the booking.
detail.bamboo_raft: Worth it during peak water. Quick queue, immersive waterfall experience, feels like face-washing.
detail.fish_scale_dam: Kids love it. May be closed when water is high. MUST wear swimwear or bring change of clothes - you WILL get wet. Ground is VERY slippery. Not worth visiting without kids.
detail.dong_na_yu_wan: NOT recommended for children. Water route = sleepy, land route = hot with round-trip walk. Kids can't handle the heat.
detail.mingshi_pastoral: Rent a three-wheeled scooter, cruise around on dedicated cycling path. Chill and scenic.

food_recommendations.xita_restaurant: Like '一尺花园' style, Western-ish food, great taste and atmosphere
food_recommendations.daohua_xishi: At homestay door, average environment but tasty food, karaoke at night
food_recommendations.shanhe_coffee: Cafe at a homestay, open to public, great for afternoon tea. Homestay itself also looks good.
food_recommendations.warning: Passion fruit spare ribs at the food stalls - not palatable. Roast suckling pig a bit greasy.

detail.overall_verdict: Chongzuo is beautiful, but NOT that suitable for small children (崇左很美，但没那么适合小朋友)
detail.detian_to_mingshi_one_day: Yes possible. Morning Detian, lunch at Zhongyue Street outside Detian, then drive to Mingshi (not far)

top_results.title: 崇左｜带娃骑行明仕田园 开心到飞起
top_results.author: 不想努力的女马

top_results.title: 特种兵速进！带娃德天瀑布+明仕田园一日游
top_results.author: 一个芒果

detail.charter_car: 600 CNY/day from Chongzuo, 1.5 hours to Detian (holidays = 3-4 hours traffic)
detail.public_transport: Chongzuo International Bus Station, tourist line 10:30, 50 CNY direct
detail.detian_bamboo_raft: 30 CNY/person (possibly older price), 20 min ride. No need to bring child life jacket - scenic area provides free children's ones.
detail.food: Zhongyue Good Eats Street: Vietnamese spring rolls, bamboo rice, ~40 CNY/person
detail.viewing_platform: Level 2 Platform #5 = best panoramic photo spot
detail.mingshi_options: Bamboo raft 80 CNY/person OR bike rental 20 CNY/hour
detail.time_note: If traffic jam, skip Mingshi or just stop for sunset photos and dinner on the way back
